title: Wave archive
problem: After waves complete, docs/BACKLOG.md and docs/ROADMAP.md retain all shipped items indefinitely. The Product Owner and Tech Lead lose signal-to-noise as historical entries inflate both files.
proposed_solution: Per-wave archive at docs/skill/arc/waves/NN-wave-name.md. arc-ship writes archive and prunes BACKLOG/ROADMAP atomically.
success_criteria: Zero Status: shipped rows in BACKLOG.
Zero Status: Completed waves in ROADMAP.
One archive file per completed wave plus orphan fallback.
constraints: Idempotent migration; archive-first write ordering; no shell text-processing tools.
assumptions: Each shipped idea belongs to one wave; existing artifact-migration patterns apply.
